description: Per-strategy conformance-vector coverage ledger. Each emitted locator strategy maps to the committed vector in which it is a measured-unique candidate (match_count 1, match_index 0) for the ground-truth element, recorded at element granularity. A hygiene lock ties every emitted strategy to a real committed vector, per platform. Extension: role_name and label are schema-reserved and not emitted, so they are outside vector scope. Desktop: every emitted strategy is either covered by a committed vector or listed under desktop-windows-gaps with a reason (a loud, accounted-for gap — never silently dropped); the union equals the emitted set.

labeled_by.reason: A Win32 STATIC preceding an EDIT surfaces as the EDIT's UIA Name (accessible name) but NOT as the UIA LabeledBy relation element — the relation is exposed only by controls with a UIA provider (e.g. WPF/XAML AutomationProperties.LabeledBy) or a bespoke IRawElementProviderSimple. Emitting it from the controlled Win32 fixture would need a custom server-side UIA provider plus the windows crate's `implement` feature on the shipped desktop crate — disproportionate for one strategy. labeled_by resolution is implemented and unit-tested in the desktop query evaluator; only fixture emission of a live vector is deferred until a labeled_by-bearing control is worth adding.
